headline: Prototyping cross-platform modules and backend services to keep ShindoClient future-proof.

features.title: Microsoft Auth System
features.description: Secure and automatic Microsoft authentication for the Shindo Client.

features.title: Layout System
features.description: Let you change the layout of the Shindo Client for a more personalized experience.

features.title: Profile Share & Sync
features.description: Share your profiles with your friends and also add community made profiles.

features.title: Translations
features.description: Let you change the language of the Shindo Client.

features.title: Mod Icons
features.description: Mod Icons for Shindo Client UIs and more.

features.title: Better Spotify Customizations
features.description: Complete library management system, artist and playlist visualization, and an in-client Spotify controller matching the official client experience.

features.title: Via Version Modernization
features.description: Overhaul the Via Version system to support modern Minecraft versions, ensuring seamless connectivity across protocol versions and fixing compatibility issues.

features.title: Community Made Addons
features.description: Let you make your own addons for Shindo Client and/or add community made addons. Includes a full rework of the Network Manager system to improve server connectivity, fix Internet-related bugs, and resolve memory leaks in vanilla Minecraft.

features.title: Friends Chat
features.description: It allows you to add friends who use the client to a list and allows you to chat with them without needing to be on the same server.

features.title: Community Made Layouts & Themes
features.description: Let you make your own layouts and themes for Shindo Client and/or add community made layouts and themes.
